ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the tournament was held */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the tournament started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the tournament ended */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the tournament */,
  "tournament_format" TEXT /* Format of the tournament */,
  "total_prize_pool" TEXT /* Total prize money for the tournament */,
  "winning_prize" TEXT /* Prize money for the winning team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament in which the match was played */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the match was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "loser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing team */,
  "man_of_the_match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the man of the match */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match */,
  "toss_winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the toss */,
  "toss_decision" TEXT /* Decision made by the toss-winning team */,
  "umpire1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first umpire */,
  "umpire2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second umpire */,
  "match_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_umpire1_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire1_id") REFERENCES umpires ("umpire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_man_of_the_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("man_of_the_match_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_umpire2_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire2_id") REFERENCES umpires ("umpire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_loser_id FOREIGN KEY ("loser_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_toss_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("toss_winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "home_venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's home venue */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the team */,
  "team_jersey_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team's jersey */,
  "team_captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_captain_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_home_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "opened" TEXT /* Year the venue was opened */,
  "venue_address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  "venue_image" TEXT /* Image of the venue */,
  "venue_seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_image" TEXT /* Image of the player */,
  "player_jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "player_role" TEXT /* Role of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "man_of_the_match" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was man of the match */,
  "performance" TEXT /* Performance details of the man of the match */,
  "performance_details" TEXT /* Detailed performance statistics of the man of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_man_of_the_match_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "man_of_the_series" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was man of the series */,
  "performance" TEXT /* Performance details of the man of the series */,
  "performance_details" TEXT /* Detailed performance statistics of the man of the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_man_of_the_series_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score in a match */,
  "best_bowling" TEXT /* Best bowling performance in a match */,
  "strike_rate" TEXT /* Strike rate of the player */,
  "economy_rate" TEXT /* Economy rate of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played */,
  "matches_won" INTEGER /* Number of matches won */,
  "matches_lost" INTEGER /* Number of matches lost */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored */,
  "wickets_lost" INTEGER /* Total wickets lost */,
  "net_run_rate" TEXT /* Net run rate of the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "umpires" (
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each umpire */,
  "umpire_name" TEXT /* Name of the umpire */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the umpire */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("umpire_id")
)
